prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: fifth/sixth-round CopayGuard app logo exploration matching the current product UI
Primary request: create a dark developer-tool healthcare-fintech logo mark for CopayGuard based on the current app vibe: off-black surfaces, warm orange security accents, subtle green savings signal, monospaced technical UI feel, happier and friendlier than a cyber-security logo
Subject: one simple logo mark, centered in a rounded-square dark app icon, based on a pill/capsule mascot and/or a protective shield; shield should feel like cost protection; savings can be hinted with a check, downward price motion, or green success glow
Style/medium: polished 2D vector-friendly app icon, clean geometric forms, thick readable silhouette, dark technical badge, minimal linework, premium developer-tool feel, friendly patient-facing personality
Composition/framing: centered, generous padding, strong small-icon readability, no busy background, no wordmark
Color palette: charcoal/off-black background, graphite gray body, warm orange/copper shield accents, small green success/savings highlight, muted cream highlights; avoid teal, blue, purple, and red-dominant palettes
Text (verbatim): none
Constraints: no written text, no letters, no numbers, no fake glyphs, no watermark, no red cross, no hospital logo, no Claude logo, no Anthropic starburst, no exact copy of any existing brand mark
Avoid: scary, aggressive, childish, cluttered hands, detailed fingers, fake UI text, thin details that disappear at favicon size
Direction: a happy gray pill mascot peeking from behind an oversized orange-rimmed shield, simple smiling face, one minimal hand on the shield, green check glow on the shield edge, friendly and protective.
